module.name: cli
module.spec: Dispatch parses the command-line arguments and routes to the appropriate handler function. Supported commands: add, list, remove, order, report, search. Unknown commands print usage and exit 1. Authentication is checked via Authenticate before dispatch (requires --api-key flag).

ParseArgs handles two flag formats: --flag=value and --flag value. Boolean flags use the --flag form (no value). Unknown flags are silently ignored (not treated as errors). Positional arguments are collected in order of appearance.

The add command accepts three flags: --name (string, required), --quantity (int, default 1), --price (float64, default 0.0). The item is validated via ValidateItem before being added to inventory via AddItem. There are no category or priority flags.

The list command prints all items in a table format with columns: Name, Quantity, Price. Items are sorted alphabetically by Name (no grouping). No --category or --priority filter flags exist. See ListItems.
